title: Notification No.49/2013-Cus(NT),dt. 25.4.2013
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 49/2013-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 25th April, 2013 S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional/Joint Commissioner of Customs (R&I) Mumbai to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- TABLE Sr. No. SCN File No. Date of SCN Issuing Authority (1) (2) (3) (4) 1.
